chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-1913 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1. For hearing of CMA No. 27500/2025 2. For hearing of main case 14-03-2025 Mr. Asif Ali Khawaja Advocate for the Petitioner Ms. Noor-ul-Ain Advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Amin Lakhani Advocate for the Intervenor Mr. Ameeruddin Advocate for Karachi University Mr. Abdul Basit Qazi Advocate holds brief for Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon Advocate for Respondent along with Mr. Fareed Ahmed A. Dayo, the Principal, SM (Govt) Law College Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh The present petition seeks directions in writ jurisdiction to regulate the mechanism and affairs of Karachi University. The relief(s) sought includes seeking direction even to the extent of holding of graduation and farewell ceremony etc. Prima facie learned counsel could not demonstrate whether the concerned respondent could be issued a writ in exercise of Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Even otherwise pursuant to Supreme Court’s Judgment reported as PLD 2002 SC 92, the interference in such matters in writ jurisdiction has been duly deprecated. In view of the foregoing, this petition is found to be misconceived and dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
